summary: Backend-only test of NVP Labs admin CMS extension: Projects, Pricing Plans, Products, and Site Content CRUD plus public seed/visibility behavior. Added /app/backend/tests/test_cms_crud.py with 18 tests covering seeded public data, admin gating (401/403), full admin CRUD with httpOnly cookies, publish-flag hiding from public lists, pricing public sort by `order` ASC, site-content PUT upsert idempotency by key (no duplicates), and admin-create -> public-visible end-to-end. All 18 new tests pass. Full regression suite (50 tests total including prior test_nvplabs_backend.py) also fully green.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~690 lines and beginning to mix auth, models, public endpoints and CMS routes. Consider splitting into routers (auth.py, public.py, admin_cms.py) and a models module once it crosses ~700 lines.

_admin_crud_routes() registers closures inside a function — works, but pricing_plans collection uses underscore while the route slug is 'pricing-plans'. Mapping is correct but worth a short docstring.
Public /api/site-content returns a dict keyed by key — fine, but on duplicate keys (shouldn't happen due to unique index) the last write wins silently. Unique index on `key` is in place: good.
Admin POST/PUT for projects/pricing/products do not coerce `order` to int beyond Pydantic — fine because schema enforces int. No issue, just noting.
Cookies use secure=False (preview env). For production deployment, secure must be True over HTTPS; consider env-toggled flag.
No pagination on admin list endpoints (to_list(1000)). Acceptable for current scale; flag when collections grow.
test_credentials: Admin: nvplabs@gmail.com / NVPLabs@2025 (seeded on startup, verified working).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Verified existing startup seeders: 8 projects, 3 pricing plans, 4 products, 7 site_content keys (including hero_kicker, hero_title_line_1, cta_headline).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (https://nvp-premium-showcase.preview.emergentagent.com). Admin login sets httpOnly cookies — use requests.Session() and reuse across calls. All admin CRUD endpoints follow pattern: GET/POST /api/admin/{resource}, PUT/DELETE /api/admin/{resource}/{id}. Site-content is PUT-only upsert (no POST) keyed by `key`; DELETE uses /api/admin/site-content/{key}. Public lists filter by published=true; admin lists return everything. Public projects/products sort by (order ASC, created_at DESC); pricing-plans by (order ASC, created_at ASC). Tests clean up created records.
